creator: cristianorolim@hotmail.com
text:
The build process has failed because a patch file was ignored (line 98 of the log file).

But, when I build the port in real machine with make, the patch is correctly applied. Any advice about the patch format I am using?

Thanks.
Cristiano Rolim Pereira
